content: TimeSeriesSplit preserves temporal order but SAME group (date/entity/session) can appear in BOTH train and test -> optimistic leakage for panel/grouped data. GroupKFold keeps groups separate but shuffles across time. Neither alone correct for grouped time-series. mlxtend GroupTimeSeriesSplit or custom BaseCrossValidator preserves temporal order AND keeps each group on one side. Core pitfall: vanilla TimeSeriesSplit on race-level panel data leaks same-day info across the train/test boundary.
